title: Verify locked content state for cancelled/paused users
description: Test that a user who has cancelled or paused their trial cannot access any premium content from the Trial Corner or other parts of the app.
preconditions: User has cancelled or paused their trial.

steps.description: 2. Verify the 'Engagement' and 'Trending' content sections are visually locked.
3. Click on a locked content item.
4. Navigate to the homepage or a show page directly and attempt to play content.

expected_result: User is blocked from playing content. Clicking locked items in the Trial Corner should do nothing or show a message to reactivate. The `trial-corner-trending-clicked` event should not fire.
